title: THIS Is The Biggest Mistake Most Millennials Make
summary: A discussion about millennial lifestyle patterns, criticizing their lack of commitment to relationships, property ownership, and long-term investments. The conversation explores how millennials inherited boomer optimism without the economic advantages that justified it.

key_claims.claim: Most millennials have tenuous connections to reality and society due to lack of ownership and commitment
Millennials inherited boomer optimism but without the economic tailwinds that justified it
